rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HEIDEMARIE WILMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, although: 1) No bank statements have been filed to verify the ending cash balances. 2) No proof of service has been filed to show a copy of the supplement was served on each person who requested special notice. See Probate Code section 1252(a) & CRC 7.53(b). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGINA SUSAN KNIGHT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the holographic will dated just January 2021 should be admitted and if Walter Cohn should be appointed as Executor with full authority and no bond. The only proper form of notice for Petition for Probate is the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Petition to Administer Estate. The Court to determine if defective notice may be waived. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME. PLEASE HAVE YOUR CASE NUMBER AND NAME READY FOR THE CLERK. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GUSTAVO P. SERAFIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/27/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Notice was not given also to Sonia Diaz (or Dias?). Is a conservatee in Florida not entitled to direct notice? (2) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] The procedures must be part of the Notice of Hearing. A separate Civil from of proof of service is not sufficient. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 6/15/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (It would have been helpful if the report had stated the date on which confirmation of the Florida guardianship was filed)

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF HEAVEN MILLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Withdraw Funds From Blocked Account
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/27/23. (No earlier availability.) An amended petition must be filed, either signed and verified by the guardian, who is a Court-appointed fiduciary, seeking approval of her attorney's fees and authority for her to pay the fees from the guardianship estate [Probate Code Section 2640], or signed and verified by the attorney [Probate Code Section 2642], all in one complete amended pleading. Notice of the amended petition must be served after the amended petition is filed. If the amended petition is the attorney's, notice must be given to the guardian. (1) The "petition", as filed on 1/27/23 and signed only by the attorney, was not complete. The pertinent time sheets and attorney declaration were filed separately on 1/30/23, so notice mailed on 1/27/23 of just the "petition" was incomplete. (2) A fee petition in a Probate proceeding does not require a memorandum of points and authorities or judicial notice; the fee petition should stand on its own and the attorney declaration required by LRSF 14.53 should just accompany the time sheets attached to the petition. (3) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 6/15/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Costs paid to One Legal ($617.70 on 5/27/22, $113.25 on 6/3/22, $133.84 on 7/26/22, $155.71 on 8/9/22, and $249.65 on 11/23/22) were not itemized and appear to be quite high. Why were papers not just mailed to the Court for filing? Many of the time entries appear to be for services that a paralegal or a secretary could have done. This Court does not ordinarily allow time spent on research. After procedural issues are addressed, an appearance will likely be required. LRSF 14.35 E. sets out how distribution to a minor from a decedent's estate may be made.)
